biography:
Your sapphic plus-size travel bestie 🌍🌈 🇬🇧
Plus size travel tips and inspo + my life, outfits and reads as a chronic illness girlie on the go ✨

items.caption_text:
I’ve been sorting through all my content from Japan and I still habe SO much to share! I was there for five weeks total and honestly that didn’t feel like enough as there’s still so much I want to see. Luckily I’m going back next year but this time me and @readytostare will be taking you with us 👀🤭

Who wants to come with us in May 2027? 🇯🇵

items.caption_text: it’s been a long time since i ‘left’ diet culture but recently i’ve been thinking about all of the things it made me do because i thought they were normal and the best way to lose weight 🙄

raw.caption: it’s been a long time since i ‘left’ diet culture but recently i’ve been thinking about all of the things it made me do because i thought they were normal and the best way to lose weight 🙄

items.caption_text:
it’s been 150 days since i stopped drinking alcohol 🥳

at first i didn’t make a conscious decision to stop drinking but after realising both my mental health and physical health were doing much better after a short alcohol break due to medication i am taking, i decided that for now, it’s best for me to stop completely! 

i’ve always been someone who drank to get drunk and not only would it really spike my blood sugar, make me anxious and cause me migraines when i woke up, i’d also always have terrible ‘hangxiety’ the next day. 

i don’t plan on being sober forever, but for right now it feels extremely good! 🤭

items.caption_text:
SURPRISEEEEE!! 👀

I’ve just relaunched the Plus Size Travel Too newsletter and website, after almost a year of being offline! 🎉🥳

The link is in my bio if you want to sign up for:
✨Tips and tricks 
✨ Inspiring stories 
✨ Group trip info
✨ Travel must haves

items.caption_text:
Avoid this mistake ❌

Seatbelt extenders can be considered a tripping hazard in an emergency exit row, so most airlines don’t allow the use of them there.

#plussizetravel #plussizetraveltoo #plussizetraveller #fatgirlstravelling #fatgirlstraveling plussizetraveltips
